evals.expected_output: A standalone self-contained bilingual HTML digest with an English | 中文 comparison layout, a bilingual title and metadata block, fixed sections for At a Glance, Summary, Key Points, Evidence & Data, Visuals, and a terminal terminology glossary table.
expectations: Output includes at least one .html file
The HTML file is self-contained with no external CSS or JS dependencies
The HTML contains bilingual title content in English and Chinese
The HTML contains paired English and Chinese content blocks
The HTML contains an At a Glance section with exactly two sentences per language
The HTML contains at least 6 distinct key points or bullet items
The HTML contains an Evidence & Data section
The HTML contains a Visuals section
The HTML ends with a terminology glossary table containing English and Chinese terminology columns
The HTML includes a source link back to the original URL
